user.title: LG ThinQ account
user.description: Only Wi-Fi refrigerators will be discovered. Enable browser login for a social account.

callback.title: Authorize LG ThinQ
callback.description: Open the login URL, sign in to LG, then paste the complete callback URL.

homekit.title: Direct HomeKit
homekit.description: One HomeKit accessory will include every refrigerator service.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to LG ThinQ.
error.credentials_required: Enter email and password or enable browser login.
error.invalid_country: Country must be a valid ISO code, such as MX.
error.invalid_language: Language must look like es-MX or en-US.
error.invalid_pin: HomeKit code must use the XXX-XX-XXX format.

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to LG ThinQ.
abort.no_refrigerators: No compatible Wi-Fi refrigerators exist in this LG ThinQ account.
